mapper.select: SELECT T.NAME, IFNULL(A.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP, '-') AS AGENT_CONNECTED_IP, IFNULL(TU.SERVICE_NM, '-') AS SERVICE_NM FROM PI_TARGETS T LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_TARGET_USER TU ON T.TARGET_ID = TU.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = TU.AP_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_AGENTS A ON A.AGENT_NAME = T.NAME AND A.AP_NO = T.AP_NO AND A.AGENT_USE = 'Y' WHERE T.TARGET_USE = 'Y' AND T.TARGET_ID = #{target_id} AND T.AP_NO = #{ap_no} LIMIT 1
SELECT U.USER_NO, U.USER_EMAIL, IFNULL(U.SOSOK, '') AS SOSOK, U.USER_NAME FROM pi_user U WHERE USER_NO = #{user_no}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PI_TEMPLATE (NAME, CON, FLAG) VALUES (#{name}, #{template_con}, 'Y')

INSERT INTO PI_TEMPLATE (NAME, CON, FLAG, FLAG_CON) VALUES (#{name}, #{template_con}, 'Y', CONCAT('sendmail_', (SELECT IFNULL(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(FLAG_CON, 10) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1 FROM PI_TEMPLATE T WHERE FLAG_CON LIKE 'sendmail_%')))
mapper.select: SELECT T.CON FROM PI_TEMPLATE T WHERE T.NAME = #{mailFlag} AND T.FLAG = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE PI_TEMPLATE SET FLAG = 'N' WHERE FLAG = 'Y' AND NAME = #{name}
mapper.select: SELECT COM, PWD FROM PI_SETTING_DATA WHERE NAME ='mail' AND STATUS != 'N' ORDER BY IDX DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT IDX, NAME, CON, FLAG, FLAG_CON FROM PI_TEMPLATE WHERE FLAG = 'Y' AND FLAG_CON LIKE 'sendmail_%' ORDER BY IDX DESC
SELECT IDX, NAME, CON, FLAG, FLAG_CON FROM PI_TEMPLATE WHERE IDX = #{idx} AND FLAG = 'Y' AND FLAG_CON LIKE 'sendmail_%'
mapper.update: UPDATE PI_TEMPLATE SET FLAG = 'N' WHERE IDX = #{idx} AND FLAG_CON LIKE 'sendmail_%'
mapper.select: SELECT D.target_id, D.ap_no, D.name AS SERVER_NAME, D.service_nm AS SERVICE_NM, SUM(D.TOTAL_CNT) AS TOTAL_CNT, SUM(D.PHONE) AS PHONE, SUM(D.EMAIL) AS EMAIL, SUM(D.ACCOUNT) AS ACCOUNT, SUM(D.CARD) AS CARD, SUM(D.SSN) AS SSN, SUM(D.FOREIGNER) AS FOREIGNER, SUM(D.DRIVER) AS DRIVER, SUM(D.PASSPORT) AS PASSPORT FROM ( SELECT T.TARGET_ID, T.AP_NO, T.NAME, IFNULL(TU.SERVICE_NM, '-') AS SERVICE_NM, SUM(S.MATCH_COUNT) AS TOTAL_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN CP.PATTERN_IDX = 1 THEN S.MATCH_COUNT ELSE 0 END) AS PHONE, SUM(CASE WHEN CP.PATTERN_IDX = 2 THEN S.MATCH_COUNT ELSE 0 END) AS EMAIL, SUM(CASE WHEN CP.PATTERN_IDX = 3 THEN S.MATCH_COUNT ELSE 0 END) AS ACCOUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN CP.PATTERN_IDX = 4 THEN S.MATCH_COUNT ELSE 0 END) AS CARD, SUM(CASE WHEN CP.PATTERN_IDX = 5 THEN S.MATCH_COUNT ELSE 0 END) AS SSN, SUM(CASE WHEN CP.PATTERN_IDX = 6 THEN S.MATCH_COUNT ELSE 0 END) AS FOREIGNER, SUM(CASE WHEN CP.PATTERN_IDX = 7 THEN S.MATCH_COUNT ELSE 0 END) AS DRIVER, SUM(CASE WHEN CP.PATTERN_IDX = 8 THEN S.MATCH_COUNT ELSE 0 END) AS PASSPORT FROM PI_TARGETS T LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_TARGET_USER TU ON T.TARGET_ID = TU.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = TU.AP_NO , PI_CUSTOM_PATTERN CP, PI_SUMMARY S, PI_FIND F LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_DATA_PROCESSING PRC ON F.TARGET_ID = PRC.TARGET_ID AND F.AP_NO = PRC.AP_NO AND F.HASH_ID = PRC.HASH_ID AND PRC.DATA_PROCESSING_GROUP_IDX IN (SELECT MAX(DATA_PROCESSING_IDX) FROM PI_DATA_PROCESSING GROUP BY HASH_ID) WHERE T.TARGET_ID = #{target_id} AND T.AP_NO = #{ap_no} AND T.TARGET_ID = F.TARGET_ID AND F.HASH_ID = S.OBJECT_ID AND F.DELDATE IS NULL AND F.TARGET_ID = S.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = S.AP_NO AND T.AP_NO = F.AP_NO AND INSTR(UPPER(S.DATA_TYPE), CP.PATTERN_CODE) > 0 AND PRC.APPROVAL_STATUS IS NULL GROUP BY F.HASH_ID HAVING TOTAL_CNT > 0 ) D GROUP BY D.TARGET_ID, D.AP_NO

SELECT D.TARGET_ID, D.AP_NO, D.NAME AS SERVER_NAME, D.SERVICE_NM, IFNULL((SELECT USER_NAME FROM PI_USER WHERE USER_NO = D.SERVER1), '-') AS MANAGER1, IFNULL((SELECT USER_NAME FROM PI_USER WHERE USER_NO = D.SERVER2), '-') AS MANAGER2 FROM ( SELECT T.TARGET_ID, T.AP_NO, T.NAME, IFNULL(TU.SERVICE_NM, '-') AS SERVICE_NM, MAX(CASE WHEN TU.USERFLAG = 'server1' THEN TU.USER_NO ELSE '' END) AS SERVER1, MAX(CASE WHEN TU.USERFLAG = 'server2' THEN TU.USER_NO ELSE '' END) AS SERVER2 FROM PI_TARGETS T LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_TARGET_USER TU ON T.TARGET_ID = TU.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = TU.AP_NO WHERE T.TARGET_USE = 'Y' AND T.TARGET_ID = #{target_id} AND T.AP_NO = #{ap_no} GROUP BY T.TARGET_ID, T.AP_NO ) D
SELECT USER_EMAIL FROM PI_USER WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} AND USER_EMAIL IS NOT NULL AND USER_EMAIL != ''
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PI_MAIL_HISTORY (MAIL_TITLE, MAIL_CONTENT, SENDER_ID, SENDER_NAME, RECEIVERS, CC_RECEIVERS, SEND_RESULT, ERROR_MSG, SEND_DATE) VALUES (#{mail_title}, #{mail_content}, #{sender_id}, #{sender_name}, #{receivers}, #{cc_receivers}, #{send_result}, #{error_msg}, NOW())
INSERT INTO PI_MAIL_TARGET (MAIL_IDX, TARGET_ID, AP_NO) VALUES (#{mail_idx}, #{target_id}, #{ap_no})

INSERT INTO PI_MAIL_TARGET (MAIL_IDX, TARGET_ID, AP_NO) VALUES
(#{mail_idx}, #{item.target_id}, #{item.ap_no})
mapper.select:
SELECT H.MAIL_IDX, H.MAIL_TITLE, H.SENDER_NAME, H.RECEIVERS, H.CC_RECEIVERS, H.SEND_RESULT, DATE_FORMAT(H.SEND_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS SEND_DATE, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PI_MAIL_TARGET T WHERE T.MAIL_IDX = H.MAIL_IDX) AS TARGET_CNT FROM PI_MAIL_HISTORY H ORDER BY H.MAIL_IDX DESC
LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT H.MAIL_IDX, H.MAIL_TITLE, H.MAIL_CONTENT, H.SENDER_ID, H.SENDER_NAME, H.RECEIVERS, H.CC_RECEIVERS, H.SEND_RESULT, H.ERROR_MSG, DATE_FORMAT(H.SEND_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS SEND_DATE FROM PI_MAIL_HISTORY H WHERE H.MAIL_IDX = #{mail_idx}
SELECT T.SEQ, T.TARGET_ID, T.AP_NO, (SELECT NAME FROM PI_TARGETS WHERE TARGET_ID = T.TARGET_ID AND AP_NO = T.AP_NO LIMIT 1) AS SERVER_NAME FROM PI_MAIL_TARGET T WHERE T.MAIL_IDX = #{mail_idx}
